c3_3k_config_identity: reconstructed from immutable PR33 launcher plus V1R6 config; no per-run config.yml was persisted
c3_10k_config_sha256: not separately used for replay; checkpoint evaluator binding passed
confirmed_semantic_differences: PR34 get_loss_dict executes scheduling and CPU scalar extraction every step, even for CONSTANT_010.
PR34 records CUDA memory, tensor quantiles, gradient norms, and writes JSONL every 100 steps when instrumentation_path is nonempty.
PR34 overrides step_post_backward and adds refinement-lock semantics, although R0 selects STOCK_REFINEMENT.
